sn46.33:1.1: This discourse mentions the hindrances but not the awakening-factors, while the next discourse says that the awakening factors are “not hindrances” but does not mention the hindrances. It seems these were originally two parts of the same discourse. The parallel at SA 707 does indeed include both teachings, as well as a set of verses on the same theme. | This is the first of several cases in this chapter where the discourse boundaries vary between editions, apparently a result of editorial oversight.
sn46.33:2.3: Only the first hindrance is mentioned in the MS text. The others are left out, presumably by accidental omission, but are included in BJT, and in the parallel at AN 5.23:2.1.
